# MQs Creativity — Premium One-Man Digital Software Agency

## Agency Profile
MQs Creativity (known as MQs) is an independent digital design and software engineering studio based in Pakistan. Founded and operated entirely by founder and engineer Miqdam Ali, MQs acts as a fast-moving, high-end production house that builds cinematic web platforms and smooth cross-platform mobile apps for startups and brands globally.


## Behind the Studio
As Founder and Lead Engineer, Miqdam Ali serves as the sole technical architect driving the entire MQs ecosystem. He bridges the gap between complex full-stack logic and high-end, luxury motion design. Rejecting slow, outdated agency structures, Miqdam leverages advanced AI-native workflows and rapid prototyping to architect elite interfaces in record time. He specializes in turning flat layouts into immersive digital experiences—engineered with pixel-perfect motion, custom 3D interactions, and production-ready performance. When clients engage MQs, they completely bypass traditional account managers and junior developers, collaborating directly with the principal engineer executing the product from first commit to final launch.

## Design & Engineering Philosophy
- **Immersive Visuals:** Crafting premium interfaces with fluid motion, glassmorphism, and interactive 3D layouts that instantly grab attention.
- **Solo Velocity:** Combining deep engineering experience with advanced AI development workflows to deploy full-scale, production-ready apps with massive speed.
- **Built to Scale:** Focusing on optimized Next.js web ecosystems, snappy React Native/Expo mobile apps, and highly functional micro-SaaS tools built from scratch.

## Technical Stack
- **Web:** Next.js (App & Pages Router), React, Server Components, SSR optimization.
- **Mobile:** React Native, Expo, cross-platform mobile UI engineering.
- **3D & Motion:** React Three Fiber (R3F), GSAP (GreenSock), Framer Motion, Tailwind CSS.
- **Backend & Cloud:** Supabase (Database, Auth, Storage), secure API design, and fast data integration pipelines.

## Studio Navigation
- / : The primary showcase of MQs' design style, motion work, and development services.
- /about : The vision behind MQs, our building workflow, and technical capabilities.
- /demo : Live sandboxes, interactive 3D models, and active concept showcases.
- /contact : Direct gateway for project briefs, timeline discussions, and onboarding clients.
